creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-teaching/ 404s with:

404 Not Found
nginx/1.20.1

despite being linked from https://lists.freebsd.org/. The subscription link (https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-teaching) works.

https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-teaching claims "No such list freebsd-teaching". https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-teaching/ exists (this list sees very little traffic, all of it spam except the initial welcome email).
